title: Tandem RNA-sequencing Pipeline
author: Blaine, Fritz
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Initial public release of the Tandem RNA-seq pipeline. Used for the analysis of data in association with the publication of the article, " RNA-sequencing of paired tape-strips and skin biopsies in atopic dermatitis reveals key differences " which was accepted for publication in the journal, Allergy in February 2024.
